---
title: "Board 2023–2027"
description: "Current executive board members of ISA RC42 Social Psychology."
---

::: {.section-header}
## RC42 Executive Board
Serving for the 2023–2027 term.
:::

The current executive board of RC42 Social Psychology was elected to lead the committee's initiatives and representation internationally.

### Executive Officers

::: {.board-highlight}
::: {.card-rc42 .border-navy}
::: {.card-role}
President
:::
::: {.card-title}
Juan Carlos Castillo
:::
::: {.card-text}
Universidad de Chile, Chile<br><br>Program Coordinator for the XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027.
:::
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-teal}
::: {.card-role}
Secretary / Treasurer
:::
::: {.card-title}
Lisa Slattery Walker
:::
::: {.card-text}
University of North Carolina at Charlotte, USA
:::
:::
:::

### Board Members

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.card-rc42 .border-blue}
::: {.card-role}
Board Member
:::
::: {.card-title}
Charles Puttergill
:::
::: {.card-text}
University of Pretoria, South Africa
:::
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-navy}
::: {.card-role}
Board Member
:::
::: {.card-title}
Karla Henríquez Ojeda
:::
::: {.card-text}
Université catholique de Louvain, Belgium
:::
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-teal}
::: {.card-role}
Board Member
:::
::: {.card-title}
Deepak Kumar Verma
:::
::: {.card-text}
Dr. B. R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences, India
:::
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-blue}
::: {.card-role}
Online Communication Manager
:::
::: {.card-title}
To be announced
:::
::: {.card-text}
This position is currently vacant.
:::
:::
:::

### Program Coordination

| Congress | Coordinator |
|----------|------------|
| XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027 | Juan Carlos Castillo |

::: {.info-box}
Board members are elected at the ISA World Congress of Sociology. The next election will take place at the XXI ISA World Congress in 2027.
:::
